subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the chalice of the Covenant! All of humankind in this world are but wanderers in the wilderness, rootless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست پیمانه پیمان نوع انسان در اینجهان کلا و طرا بادیه پیمایند و بی بن و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @high station of the true believer, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
